(1) These rules may be called the Senior Citizen Savings Scheme (Amendment) Rules, 2015. (2) They shall be deemed to have come into force on the 1st day of April, 2015. 2. In the Senior Citizen Savings Scheme Rules, 2004, in rule 7, in sub-rule (1), after the third provisio, following proviso shall be inserted, namely:— “Provided also that in the case of a deposit made under these rules on or after the 1st day of April, 2015, it shall bear at the rate of 9.3 per cent. per annum from the date of deposit.” EXPLANATORY MEMORANDUM The Ministry of Finance, Department of Economic Affairs (Budget Division) vide its O.M. No. 6-1/2011-NS.II (Pt.), dated the 11th November, 2011 has communicated to all concerned the various decisions taken by the Government on the recommendations of the Shyamala Gopinath Committee for comprehensive review of National Small Savings Fund (NSSF). Accordingly, the rates of interests on various small savings schemes for the financial year 2015-16 revised with effect from 1st April, 2015, have been communicated vide its O.M. No. 6-1/2011-NS-II, dated the 31st March, 2015. It is certified that the interests of no deposit holder shall be prejudicially affected by the retrospective effect given to the notification. [F. No. 6-1/2011/NS-II] Dr. RAJAT BHARGAVA, Jt. Secy. Note : The Senior Citizens Savings Scheme Rules, 2004 were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide notification number G.S.R. 490(E), dated the 2nd August, 2004 and subsequently amended vide numbers G.S.R. 706(E), dated the 27th October, 2004, G.S.R. 176(E), dated the 23rd March, 2006, G.S.R. 390(E), dated the 24th May 2007, G.S.R. 639(E), dated the 28th July, 2010, G.S.R. 770(E), dated the 19th October, 2011, G.S.R. 321(E), dated the 25th April 2012, G.S.R. 402(E), dated the 25th June, 2013, G.S.R.224(E), dated the 13th March, 2014 and G.S.R. 492(E ), dated the 11th July, 2014. -- 2 of 4 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)] Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई दली, 27 जुलाई, 2015 सा.का.िन सा.का.िन सा.का.िन सा.का.िन. 593 . 593 . 593 . 593(अ) (अ) (अ) (अ)....— — — —केीय सरकार, सरकारी बचत बक अिधिनयम, 1873 (1873 का 5) क% धारा 15 &ारा 'द( शि*य+ का 'योग करते .ए, सुकया समृिa खाता िनयम, 2014 को और संशोिधत करने के िलए िन6निलिखत िनयम बनाती है, अथा8त्:— 1. (1) इन िनयम+ का संि;< नाम सुकया समृिa खाता (संशोधन) िनयम, 2015 है। (2) ये 1 अ'ैल, 2015 को 'वृ( .ए समझे जाएंगे। 2. सुकया समृिa खाता िनयम, 2014 मA, िनयम 7 मA, उपिनयम (1) मA, िन6निलिखत परंतुक अंतःDथािपत कया जाएगा, अथा8त्:— “परंतु इन िनयम+ के अधीन 1 अ'ैल, 2015 को या उसके पGात जमा क% गई रािश क% दशा मA, इस पर जमा क% तारीख से 9.2 'ितशत 'ितवष8 क% दर पर Lयाज िमलेगा।” पीकारक ापन पीकारक ापन पीकारक ापन पीकारक ापन िव( मंMालय, आOथक काय8 िवभाग (बजट 'भाग) ने अपने तारीख 11-11-2011 के का.Qा.सं. 6-1/2011- एनएस.II(पाट8), &ारा राRीय अप बचत िनिध (एनएसएसएफ) क% Tापक समी;ा के िलए ग1ठत Vयामला गोपीनाथ सिमित क% िसफा1रश+ पर सरकार &ारा िलए गए सभी िनण8य+ क% सूचना सभी संबंिधत+ को दे दी गई है। तदनुसार, िव( वष8 2015-16 के िलए िविभZ अप बचत योजना[ के तहत जमा क% गई रािशय+ पर 1 अ'ैल, 2015 से संशोिधत Lयाज दरA 31-3-2015 के का.Qा. 6-1/2011.एनएस-II &ारा सूिचत कर दी गई है। यह 'मािणत कया जाता है क कसी भी जमाकता8 पर अिधसूचना के भूतल;ी 'भाव का 'ितकूल 'भाव नह\ पड़ेगा। [फा. सं. 6-1/2011-एनएस-II] डॉ. रजत भाग8व, संयु* सिचव नोट नोट नोट नोट :::: सुकया समृिa खाता िनयम, 2014 भारत के राजपM (असाधारण) मA तारीख 2 दस6बर, 2014 क% अिधसूचना संbया सा.का.िन. 863(अ) के ज1रए 'कािशत कए गए थे। NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th July, 2015 G.S.R. 593(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 15 of the Government Savings Banks Act, 1873 (5 of 1873), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Sukanya Samriddhi Account Rules, 2014. 1. (1) These rules may be called the Sukanya Samriddhi Account (Amendment) Rules, 2015. (2) They shall be deemed to have come into force on the 1st day of April, 2015. 2. In the Sukanya Samriddhi Account Rules, 2014, in rule 7, in sub-rule (1), the following proviso shall be inserted, namely:— “Provided that in the case of a deposit made under these rules on or after the 1st day of April, 2015, it shall bear at the rate of 9.2 per cent. per annum from the date of deposit.” -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] EXPLANATORY MEMORANDUM The Ministry of Finance, Department of Economic Affairs (Budget Division) vide its O.M. No. 6-1/2011-NS.II (Pt.), dated the 11th November, 2011 has communicated to all concerned the various decisions taken by the Government on the recommendations of the Shyamala Gopinath Committee for comprehensive review of National Small Savings Fund (NSSF). Accordingly, the rates of interests on various small savings schemes for the financial year 2015-16 revised with effect from 1st April, 2015, have been communicated vide its O.M. No. 6-01/2011-NS-II, dated the 31st March, 2015. It is certified that the interests of no deposit holder shall be prejudicially affected by the retrospective effect given to the notification. [F. No. 6-1/2011/NS-II] Dr. RAJAT BHARGAVA, Jt. Secy. Note : The Sukanya Samriddhi Account Rules, 2014 were published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary) vide notification number G.S.R. 863(E), dated the 2nd December, 2014.
